name: qb
description: QB packages a repo-aware Codex planning workflow with an existing-project assessment and gated implementation handoff prompt.

interface.shortDescription: Run repo-aware planning, assessment, audit, and handoff.
interface.longDescription: QB helps Codex inspect a repository, ask repo-aware intake questions, create a master project plan, assessment existing project state, decompose the plan into phase-level sub-plans, audit the resulting planning package for coverage, ordering, readiness, and governance, then print a gated Goal-mode implementation handoff when the audit allows it.
defaultPrompt: Use $qb to inspect this repo and plan this project.
Use $qb to assess this existing project and create phase sub-plans.
Use $qb to audit the planning docs and prepare the implementation handoff.
